changes.summary: Phase 2 BC-14 cron shell: inv-21-cron-paths.ts documents schedules and domain/entrypoint paths; QuotaResetCronEntrypoint, PostClosingCronEntrypoint (D-5/D-6/D-7), DocumentWaveCronEntrypoint delegate to domain services; CronInfrastructureModule composition root imports QuotaResetModule, PostClosingCronModule, DocumentWaveCronModule and registers entrypoint providers.
inv-21 JSDoc on midnight reset method; business logic and interim @Cron unchanged until meriter.module wires CronInfrastructureModule.
inv-21 class JSDoc; D-5/D-6/D-7 logic and interim @Cron unchanged until meriter.module wires CronInfrastructureModule.

notes: CronInfrastructureModule is the Phase 2 composition root for quota-reset, post-closing, and document-wave jobs. meriter.module.ts still imports per-job domain modules directly (out of write_set); interim @Cron on domain services avoids double-scheduling until meriter replaces those imports with CronInfrastructureModule and strips domain decorators. document-wave-cron.service.ts logic move deferred to a follow-up work unit.
